title: Command the Center
subtitle: Turn a big pawn center into space
summary: You own the center with pawns on d4 and e4. Use the space to push the engine back instead of dissolving it.

body.goal: Find the move that uses your center to gain space with a tempo, then play on against the engine.
body.successHint: A pawn on d5 grabs space and hits a piece at the same time.
body.explain: Right. d5 grabs space and hits the c6 knight, gaining a tempo while your center rolls forward and cramps Black.
body.wrong: That gives up your space. The point of a big center is to advance it with gain of tempo, not to trade it off.

misplays.explain: Taking with dxe5 dissolves the center you were trying to use. Keep it intact and expand with d5.
